response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video to identify songs: 'One Last Kiss' performed by AZKi and a guest, and 'Don't say \"lazy\"' performed by Tokoyami Towa and Hibiki Riona. 2. Performed search for 'One Last Kiss Hikaru Utada lyrics' and 'Don't say lazy Sakurakou K-On Bu lyrics'. 3. Extracted lyrics from results. 4. Mapped scenes based on song starts, ends, and the MC segment in the middle. 5. Adjusted end time of the final scene to match the video duration (04:55.036). 6. Compiled metadata and lyrics into the required JSON format, ensuring proper escaping of quotes and line breaks.
response.global_summary: The video features a live concert segment from the AZKi Birthday Live 2026. The video includes a performance of 'One Last Kiss' by Hikaru Utada, followed by an MC segment introducing Tokoyami Towa and Hibiki Riona, who then perform 'Don't say \"lazy\"' by the fictional band Sakurakou K-On Bu.

scenes.description: AZKi and a guest performer sing 'One Last Kiss'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
初めてのルーブルは
なんてことは無かったわ
私だけのモナリザ
もうとっくに出会ってたから
初めてあなたを見た
あの日動き出した歯車
止められない喪失の予感

もういっぱいあるけど
もひとつ増やしましょう
Can you give me one last kiss?
忘れたくないこと
Oh-oh-oh-oh, oh-woah, oh-oh-oh, oh-woah
忘れたくないこと
I love you more than you'll ever know

「写真は苦手なんだ」
でもそんなものはいらないわ
あなたが焼きついたまま
私の心のプロジェクター
寂しくないふりしてた
まあ、そんなのお互い様か
誰かを求めることは
即ち傷つくことだった

Oh, can you give me one last kiss?
燃えるようなキスをしよう
忘れたくても
忘れられないほど
I love you more than you'll ever know

もう分かっているよ
この世の終わりでも
年をとっても
忘れられない人
忘れられない人
忘れられない人
忘れられない人
I love you more than you'll ever know

吹いていった風のあとを
追いかけた眩しい午後
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
My first time at the Louvre
Was no big deal
Because I'd already met
My own Mona Lisa, long ago
The day I first laid eyes on you
Wheels began to turn
An unstoppable premonition of loss

We already have so many
But let's add another one
Can you give me one last kiss?
Something we don't want to forget
Oh-oh-oh-oh, oh-woah, oh-oh-oh, oh-woah
Something I don't want to forget
I love you more than you'll ever know

"I don't like being photographed"
But I don't need such things
Your image is burnt forever
In my heart's projector screen
I was pretending I wasn't lonely
Well, I guess that makes two of us
Yearning for someone
Comes hand in hand with a headache

Oh, can you give me one last kiss?
A kiss as hot as fire
So passionately that even if I wanted to
I won't be able to forget it
I love you more than you'll ever know

I already know
That whether it's the end of the world
Or if I grow up to be old...
Someone I can't forget
An unforgettable person, an unforgettable person
Someone I can't forget
I love you more than you'll ever know

Chasing after the breeze that blew by
One dazzling afternoon...

scenes.description: MC segment introducing Tokoyami Towa and Hibiki Riona.
Tokoyami Towa and Hibiki Riona perform 'Don't say \"lazy\"'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Please don't say "you are lazy"
だって本当はcrazy
白鳥たちはそう
見えないとこでバタ足するんです
本能に忠実・忠実
翻弄も重々承知
前途洋々だし…
だからたまに休憩しちゃうんです

この目でしっかり見定めて
行き先地図上マークして
近道あればそれが王道
はしょれる翼もあれば上等
ヤバ爪割れたグルーで補修した
それだけでなんか達成感
大事なのは自分かわいがること
自分を愛さなきゃ他人も愛せない

Please don't say "you are lazy"
だって本当はcrazy
能ある鷹はそう
見えないとこにピック隠すんです
想像に一生懸命
現実は絶体絶命
発展途中だし…
だから不意にピッチ外れるんです

その目に映らないだけだって
やる気はメーター振り切って
いつでも全力で夢見て
その分全力で眠って
ヤリちょい痩せた調子づいて喰った
それだけでなんで？敗北感
すかさずに目標下方修正して
柔軟に臨機応変七変化が勝ち

Please don't say "you are lazy"
だって本当はcrazy
孔雀たちはそう
ここぞという時美を見せるんです
五臓六腑・邁進邁進・願望は聡明麗人
誘惑多発だし…
だからやけに意志砕けちゃうんです

ヤバまさかred point!?いやギリクリア！
それだけでなんて全能感
大事なのは自分認めてくこと
自分を許さなきゃ他人も許せない

Please don't say "you are lazy"
だって本当はcrazy
白鳥たちはそう
見えないとこでバタ足するんです
本能に忠実・忠実
翻弄も重々承知
前途洋々だし…
だからたまに休憩しちゃうんです！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Please don't say "you are lazy"
Because, honestly, it's crazy
Swans are like that
They paddle furiously out of sight
Obedient and faithful to instinct
Fully aware of being toyed with too
The future is bright, after all...
So, sometimes, we take a break

Fix your gaze with these eyes
And mark your destination on the map
If there's a shortcut, it's the royal road
And if you have wings to fly, that's top-notch
Oh no, my nail broke, I fixed it with glue
Just that gives me a sense of accomplishment
What's important is to love yourself
If you don't love yourself, you can't love others

Please don't say "you are lazy"
Because, honestly, it's crazy
Hawks with talent are like that
They hide their picks out of sight
Giving everything to imagination
Reality is in a desperate situation
Still a work in progress...
So, unexpectedly, the pitch goes off

It's just that it doesn't reflect in those eyes
Motivation is off the charts
Always dreaming with all my might
And sleeping with all my might the same amount
Just by doing it, I got carried away
Why do I feel like I've lost?
Without hesitation, revise the goals downward
Flexibility and adaptability, changing seven times is a win

Please don't say "you are lazy"
Because, honestly, it's crazy
Peacocks are like that
They show their beauty when it counts
Body and soul, heart and mind, wishing for refinement
With temptation breaking out...
So, desperately, my will breaks

Oh no, wait, red point!? No, I cleared it!
Just that gives me such a feeling of omnipotence
What's important is to accept yourself
If you don't forgive yourself, you can't forgive others

Please don't say "you are lazy"
Because, honestly, it's crazy
Swans are like that
They paddle furiously out of sight
Obedient and faithful to instinct
Fully aware of being toyed with too
The future is bright, after all...
So, sometimes, we take a break!
